name: How much is my carpal tunnel from typing worth in workers comp in Salt Lake City?
description: $20K-$50K typical for moderate carpal tunnel based on impairment.[5]

mainEntity.name: How much is my carpal tunnel from typing worth in workers comp in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: $20K-$50K typical for moderate carpal tunnel based on impairment.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value depends on impairment rating, lost wages, and medical costs; averages $20K-$50K for moderate cases.[5] Utah calculates via permanent partial disability schedule plus TTD.[9] Key factors: (1) doctor's % impairment; (2) wage loss; (3) future care. Get rated post-MMI, negotiate settlement. Lawyer maximizes via comparables. Values vary widely.
